name: Chicken Chow Mein
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook noodles in salted boiling water until tender. Drain and rinse with cold water to remove excess starch.
2. Heat oil in a wok until smoking. Add chicken and onion; stir-fry for 3 minutes.
3. Add celery and cook briefly, then cover the wok and continue cooking for 2 minutes.
4. Stir in water chestnuts, bamboo shoots, mushrooms (or canned mushrooms), and bean sprouts. Cook for another 3 minutes with the lid on, stirring occasionally.
5. Season with salt and pepper to taste. Mix in the drained noodles and stir everything together until well combined.
NOTE: Use egg noodles only. Macaroni will break when stirred. Shrimp or pork can be substituted for chicken.
